internal_anchors.details: Covered by test suite Section 3 (Internal Links) — all href=#id targets and showTab() calls verified. No re-check performed per instructions.

external_links.details: All 12 key data-source and institutional links returned HTTP 200: john09289.github.io/predictions, john09289.github.io/predictions/wins.html, ivscc.gsfc.nasa.gov, cosmos.esa.int/gaia, oceanservice.noaa.gov, simbad.u-strasbg.fr, patents.google.com, funwithscience.net/dome-model-review, github.com/funwithscience-org, atoptics.co.uk, nasa.gov/new-horizons-parallax, llmstxt.org. data_prose_consistency.details: wins.json: 71 entries. llms.txt correctly states '71 WIN entries documenting all 69 dome WIN numbers (V51.1)'. Verdict counts: Refuted=9, Self-Contradicted=15, Misleading=21, StdModel=18, NotDemonstrated=4, Unfalsifiable=4. new_in_v51=32. uncounted-failures.json has 0 entries (empty array — acknowledged failures section in HTML renders from this). No ACKNOWLEDGED_FAILURES placeholder left unresolved in HTML.

win_detail_consistency.details: All 71 WINs have tldr_evidence and tldr_verdict fields. WIN IDs 1-69 all present plus sub-entries 057b and 058b = 71 total. Dome site has WINs 1-69 (no gaps) — our coverage is complete with correct paired sub-entries.

win_dome_alignment.details: Dome site wins.html has 69 unique WIN numbers (1-69, no gaps). Our wins.json covers all 69 plus 2 sub-entries for WINs 057 and 058 = 71 total. No number collisions or title drift detected on dome site. No new WINs added since last check.

progressive_disclosure.details: All WINs have tldr_evidence and tldr_verdict. All prospective predictions have tldr field. No empty TLDRs detected.

hardcoded_colors.details: 0 hardcoded light-theme color literals (#fff, #ffffff, #f8f9fa, etc.) found in sections.json inline styles. Theme variables are used consistently.

discoverability_infrastructure.robots_txt: present, has Allow:/ and Sitemap: directive
discoverability_infrastructure.uncounted_failures: present, 0 entries (array is empty — no acknowledged failures currently listed)
discoverability_infrastructure.meta_tags: all present: description, og:title, og:description, ClaimReview ld+json
discoverability_infrastructure.details: All discoverability infrastructure files present and well-formed.

expansion_tracker.details: next_id=295 > max_id=294 — OK. Live/archive disjoint — OK. EXP-052 gap tracked under ISS-1884 [minor]. 4 EXP-NNN files in expansions/ not in tracker (EXP-231 naming mismatch, EXP-234/243/258 have undefined output_file in tracker — files exist but tracker doesn't reference them). EXP-293 in live tracker with integrated=true (predicate violation — should have been moved to archive). EXP-190 is in draft_awaiting_human_group_review status (created 2026-04-20) — not stale-pending by clock criteria.

workspace_sync_skips.details: 0 direction-violation skips in 24h. 107 mtime-guard skips (normal — git versions newer than FUSE for applied-patches, daily-report, CAT-005). No boundary-crossing bugs.

curmudgeon_digest_coverage.details: 1 unprocessed review (WIN-048.c3.json) — within normal pipeline lag. Digest regenerated fresh before reading. 0 parse errors in digest.

broken_review_files.details: Digest regenerated fresh. 0 broken review files.

drift_audit.details: Drift audit was 76.3h old (stale >72h threshold). Refreshed this run. 15 candidates for curmudgeon re-review: 13 large rewrites, 2 TLDR-only changes. 0 verdict changes. 32 items in pre-tldr schema (skipped). Audit written to monitor/integrity/drift-audit.json.

workspace_only_files.details: FUSE .git index is stale (git operations cannot run on FUSE mount). The count reflects the delta between the FUSE directory listing and the stale .git index — NOT necessarily the true git state on GitHub. workspace-sync runs hourly and status.json shows 'ok-push-rescue-pending'. Actual GitHub state is expected to be more current than FUSE .git reports. This is the standard operational state for this project. No new escalation warranted unless push_status shows failure.

build_reproducibility.details: Build run twice in succession; output is byte-identical (deterministic). Workspace HTML now in sync with current source data (wins.json modified 2026-05-08T21:21, generate-html.js modified 2026-05-08T17:21, docs/index.html rebuilt this run). Workspace HTML differs from git-committed HTML — this is expected; the workspace is significantly ahead of the last git push. The git delta shows additions of Google Analytics, font variables, new CSS design system, updated title to V51.1, and updated WIN data.

documentation_checks.details: All 5 spot-checked CLAUDE.md paths exist. 22 reference files present in monitor/prompts/reference/. No hardcoded count patterns detected in CLAUDE.md.

issues_found.description: EXP-293 is in the live expansion tracker with integrated=true but was never moved to the archive. Per PROP-022 phase 5 predicate: live items with integrated=true should be in expansion-tracker-archive.jsonl. This is a predicate violation — the integration writer skipped the live→archive move.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Move EXP-293 from live items[] to expansion-tracker-archive.jsonl. Read current EXP-293 entry, append to archive, remove from live array. Verify disjointness invariant after move.

issues_found.description: EXP-052 ID gap in expansion tracker (live + archive). EXP-051 and EXP-053 both exist; EXP-052 is missing from all tracker surfaces. No EXP-052.json file exists.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Historical allocation gap. No action needed unless EXP-052 work is discovered. ID allocator correctness confirmed (next_id=295 > max=294).

issues_found.description: 4 EXP-NNN files in monitor/analyst/expansions/ have no matching tracker entry or have an output_file naming mismatch: EXP-231-WIN069-tldr-anchor-and-circuity-citation.json (tracker points to EXP-231.json — name mismatch), EXP-234, EXP-243, EXP-258 have files on disk but tracker output_file is undefined.
issues_found.suggested_fix: EXP-231: update tracker archive entry output_file to the full filename. EXP-234/243/258: these appear to have been integrated via patches rather than direct file output — add no_output_file_reason field to their archive entries.

issues_found.description: EXP-190 (foundational-structural) has been in draft_awaiting_human_group_review status since 2026-04-20 (~19 days). Not flagged as stale-pending by clock criteria (only applies to status=pending), but warrants awareness. This is a long-running draft awaiting human review.

summary: Site integrity: PASS. Test suite clean (3591/0). External links all live. Data-prose consistent (71 WINs, verdicts and counts match). Build deterministic. All discoverability files present with correct meta tags. No broken review files. Digest fresh. Drift audit refreshed (15 candidates, 0 verdict changes). One moderate finding: EXP-293 sits in the live tracker with integrated=true — the live→archive move was skipped by the integration writer; decider should move it to archive on next run. Three minor findings: EXP-052 gap (known, ISS-1884), 4 EXP-NNN file/tracker naming mismatches, stranded EXP-294 patches awaiting operator manual apply (already in morning briefing). EXP-190 draft is ~19 days old, awaiting human review. No critical or major issues this run.
